definition: Distraction through agitation, unsettledness, and regretful mental churn.
notes: Project preference is agitated distraction within the nīvaraṇa framework because the term names a disturbance of collectedness more than a generic diagnosis. Restlessness and remorse remains acceptable in explanatory prose where the standard pair is more informative.

context_rules.context: In explanatory prose clarifying the two-part compound
context_rules.notes: Acceptable alternate when the standard pair is clearer.

example_phrases.notes: Standard member of the fivefold list.
Useful contrast to the agitated condition named by the term.
